title: Country Garden shares drop 5% after reports it scrapped $300 million share sale

title: JPMorgan handled more than $1 million in payments from Jeffrey Epstein after firing him as client: CNBC
text: JPMorgan Chase & Co JPM, +0.67% allegedly handled more than $1.1 million in payments from Jeffrey Epstein after the time the bank has said it no longer had the sex offender as a client, CNBC reported Monday, citing a letter from attorney Linda Singer to New York federal Judge Jed Rakoff. The payments went to “girls or women” and many had Eastern European surnames, the report said, citing the letter.
